_comment: ML training defaults. Tree trainers (Main_4, scripts) read test_size, random_state, and model blocks. Main_6 / Main_7 PyTorch notebooks read neural_network.* from here. See docs/ML_CONFIG_GUIDE.md.

neural_network._comment: Main_6 (exit-plane) and Main_7 (full-profile) SimpleNN notebooks; omitted keys use notebook fallbacks. h1–h3: hidden layer widths.

tuning._comment: Optuna (Section 6b) when IF_HYPERPARAM_TUNING=True. n_trials / epochs_per_trial / validation_fraction / timeout_seconds (null = no cap).

pinn._comment: Main_8 PINN with PFR ODE residuals. Inherits neural_network.* for architecture. loss_weights controls per-term scaling (sweep these via Optuna); training controls curriculum schedule and collocation budget.

loss_weights._comment: Per-term multipliers for the composite loss: total = lambda_data*MSE + lambda_phys*(weighted sum of residuals). Sweep these to balance data fit vs constraint enforcement.

training._comment: Curriculum and collocation settings. curriculum_warmup_epochs: data-only phase before physics loss is switched on. n_colloc_per_batch: unlabelled z/L collocation points per training step. phys_loss_freq: apply physics loss every N steps (1 = every step).
